differentials.name: Ruptured pneumatosis cystoides intestinalis† with "balanced pneumoperitoneum"
differentials.raw: Ruptured pneumatosis cystoides intestinalis† with "balanced pneumoperitoneum" (= free intraperitoneal air acts as tamponade of pneumatosis cysts thus maintaining a balance between intracystic air + pneumoperitoneum)
